name: hyperlocal-event-aggregator
description: WhatsUpNYC — hyperlocal NYC events (scrapers, API, React map)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run server" "npx --yes wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health -t 60000 && npm run client"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install

author: Jayden Lam
